business_impact: 404s in autofill/compliance/report actions depending on deployment route wiring
recommended_fix: Deprecate legacy proxy, enforce single API client path, add route contract tests
test_needed_after_fix: Run questionnaire autofill/compliance/report on all role paths and verify 2xx

business_impact: Intermittent bell count mismatches and status alerts inconsistency
recommended_fix: Consolidate to one notification domain model/service and migrate callers
test_needed_after_fix: Unread count parity, bell click-through, phase update notifications

issue_title: Tenant context strictness can block platform admin flows
evidence_from_code: requireTenantActive middleware enforces tenantId; not all admin routes use requireTenantActiveOrPlatformAdmin
business_impact: Platform admin cannot access some admin/AskHawk operations
recommended_fix: Audit route guards and use platform-safe guard where applicable
test_needed_after_fix: Platform user executes all admin menus without tenant session errors

issue_title: Supplier-user creation path may expose plaintext password by email
evidence_from_code: Historical logic in auth/supplier user invite flow sends generated password text
business_impact: Security and CFR/data protection non-compliance risk
recommended_fix: Replace with invite token + mandatory first-time password set
test_needed_after_fix: Invite email contains only secure link, no password material

issue_title: Dual state engines for audit lifecycle (phaseState, trackStatus, questionnaireStatus, milestone instances)
evidence_from_code: auditRequestsMasterModel has multiple status families; tracking and workflow milestone models are separate
business_impact: UI can show conflicting statuses and wrong available actions
recommended_fix: Define canonical state machine and synchronize secondary projections
test_needed_after_fix: Transition matrix validation for all phases and tabs

issue_title: Autofill success reporting may overstate if UI render state differs
evidence_from_code: Autofill APIs return mapped counts; render-level verification not universally enforced
business_impact: Users believe answers were filled while radio/checkbox not visually selected
recommended_fix: Add post-hydration verification and mismatch telemetry before success toast
test_needed_after_fix: Compare recommended vs mapped vs form-state vs rendered selected counts

issue_title: DigiLocker listing scope may be user-level in some methods
evidence_from_code: Controller methods include user-context filters; org-wide supplier aggregation behavior not uniform
business_impact: Auditor/admin cannot see all supplier-user evidence consistently
recommended_fix: Scope listing by supplier org + audit context with explicit role policy
test_needed_after_fix: Multi-supplier-user upload then auditor consolidated view

issue_title: Menu configuration and runtime filter drift
evidence_from_code: WORK menu exists in app-config but SidebarNav forcibly hides it
recommended_fix: Remove dead menu or guard entirely via feature flag in one place
test_needed_after_fix: Menu snapshot by role has no dead entries

issue_title: Onboarding import extraction quality variable and weak fallback messaging
evidence_from_code: Profile import returns confidence/missing fields but UI outcomes can be unclear
business_impact: Low onboarding conversion and manual re-entry burden
recommended_fix: Expose extraction diagnostics, evidence snippets, and mandatory follow-up prompts
test_needed_after_fix: Upload varied document types and verify consistent prefill + guidance

issue_title: Compliance/report actions sensitive to endpoint/version drift
evidence_from_code: Multiple route families (auditor, compliance, report) and frontend calls changed across iterations
business_impact: Compliance check/report generation failures in production
recommended_fix: Introduce end-to-end contract tests for core auditor buttons and versioned API facade
test_needed_after_fix: Single-click run first compliance check + generate report succeeds on fresh deployment

issue_title: API master claim flow CAS handling not consistently ergonomic
evidence_from_code: Supplier claim popup blocks when CAS missing unless alternative path provided
business_impact: Supplier cannot claim APIs quickly, onboarding friction
recommended_fix: In-popup CAS capture + optional deferred CAS workflow with validation
test_needed_after_fix: Claim API without CAS then add/edit CAS later

issue_title: Large evidence payloads can trigger HTTP 413
evidence_from_code: User-reported 413 on execution-rag-preview with many attachments
recommended_fix: Chunk requests, server/body size policy review, async job orchestration
